series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-10 (019-0010). This form, prescribed by the State Public Defender (OPD-E-205), is used to facilitate reimbursement to the counties for the cost of providing transcripts for indigent defense cases. NOTE: The form was updated in January 1996

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current fiscal year next most recent fiscal year . Remove older records off-site storage two years
